spec.query:
SELECT sum(packets) AS value FROM $table
WHERE $timeFilter

spec.formattedQuery:
/* grafana dashboard='Clickhouse Flows ', user=admin */
SELECT
    dictGetOrDefault('dictionaries.protocols', 'name',
      toUInt64(proto),
      concat('proto-', toString(proto))) AS name,
    sum(bytes * sampling_rate) AS value
FROM default.flows_raw
WHERE date >= toDate(1781408172) AND date <= toDate(1781429772) AND time_flow_start_ns >= toDateTime64(1781408172,3) AND time_flow_start_ns <= toDateTime64(1781429772,3)
GROUP BY proto
ORDER BY value DESC
LIMIT 10
spec.query:
SELECT
    dictGetOrDefault('dictionaries.protocols', 'name',
      toUInt64(proto),
      concat('proto-', toString(proto))) AS name,
    sum(bytes * sampling_rate) AS value
FROM $table
WHERE $timeFilter
GROUP BY proto
ORDER BY value DESC
LIMIT 10

spec.formattedQuery:
/* grafana dashboard='Clickhouse Flows ', user=admin */
SELECT
    IPv4NumToString(reinterpretAsUInt32(substring(reverse(src_addr),13,4))) AS src_addr,
    IPv4NumToString(reinterpretAsUInt32(substring(reverse(dst_addr),13,4))) AS dst_addr,
    src_port,
    dst_port,
    dictGetOrDefault('dictionaries.protocols', 'name',
      toUInt64(proto), toString(proto)) AS proto,
    sum(bytes * sampling_rate) AS bytes,
    sum(packets) AS packets,
    count() AS flow_count
FROM default.flows_raw
WHERE date >= toDate(1781544568) AND date <= toDate(1781566168) AND time_flow_start_ns >= 1781544568 AND time_flow_start_ns <= 1781566168
GROUP BY src_addr, dst_addr, src_port, dst_port, proto
ORDER BY bytes DESC
LIMIT 20
spec.query:
SELECT
    IPv4NumToString(reinterpretAsUInt32(substring(reverse(src_addr),13,4))) AS src_addr,
    IPv4NumToString(reinterpretAsUInt32(substring(reverse(dst_addr),13,4))) AS dst_addr,
    src_port,
    dst_port,
    dictGetOrDefault('dictionaries.protocols', 'name',
      toUInt64(proto), toString(proto)) AS proto,
    sum(bytes * sampling_rate) AS bytes,
    sum(packets) AS packets,
    count() AS flow_count
FROM $table
WHERE $timeFilter
GROUP BY src_addr, dst_addr, src_port, dst_port, proto
ORDER BY bytes DESC
LIMIT 20

spec.formattedQuery:
/* grafana dashboard='Clickhouse Flows', user=admin */
SELECT
    toString(dst_port) AS name,
    sum(bytes * sampling_rate) AS value
FROM default.flows_raw
WHERE date >= toDate(1784501722) AND date <= toDate(1784523322) AND time_flow_start_ns >= 1784501722 AND time_flow_start_ns <= 1784523322
  AND proto IN (6, 17)
GROUP BY dst_port
ORDER BY value DESC
LIMIT 10
spec.query:
SELECT
    toString(dst_port) AS name,
    sum(bytes * sampling_rate) AS value
FROM $table
WHERE $timeFilter
  AND proto IN (6, 17)
GROUP BY dst_port
ORDER BY value DESC
LIMIT 10

spec.formattedQuery:
/* grafana dashboard='Clickhouse Flows', user=admin */
SELECT
    IPv4NumToString(reinterpretAsUInt32(substring(reverse(sampler_address),13,4))) AS sampler_ip,
    sum(bytes * sampling_rate) AS bytes,
    sum(packets) AS packets,
    count() AS flows,
    round(avg(sampling_rate)) AS avg_sampling_rate
FROM default.flows_raw
WHERE date >= toDate(1784501722) AND date <= toDate(1784523322) AND time_flow_start_ns >= toDateTime64(1784501722,3) AND time_flow_start_ns <= toDateTime64(1784523322,3)
  AND IPv4NumToString(reinterpretAsUInt32(substring(reverse(sampler_address),13,4))) IN ('10.0.34.2','192.168.10.1','192.168.30.1')
GROUP BY sampler_ip
ORDER BY bytes DESC
LIMIT 50
spec.query:
SELECT
    IPv4NumToString(reinterpretAsUInt32(substring(reverse(sampler_address),13,4))) AS sampler_ip,
    sum(bytes * sampling_rate) AS bytes,
    sum(packets) AS packets,
    count() AS flows,
    round(avg(sampling_rate)) AS avg_sampling_rate
FROM $table
WHERE $timeFilter
  AND IPv4NumToString(reinterpretAsUInt32(substring(reverse(sampler_address),13,4))) IN ($sampler)
GROUP BY sampler_ip
ORDER BY bytes DESC
LIMIT 50

spec.description: This panel is controlled by the Sampler variable
spec.title: Traffic by Sampler

spec.formattedQuery:
/* grafana dashboard='Clickhouse Flows', user=admin */
SELECT
    IPv4NumToString(reinterpretAsUInt32(substring(reverse(sampler_address),13,4))) AS name,
    count() AS value
FROM default.flows_raw
WHERE date >= toDate(1784501722) AND date <= toDate(1784523322) AND time_flow_start_ns >= toDateTime64(1784501722,3) AND time_flow_start_ns <= toDateTime64(1784523322,3)
  AND IPv4NumToString(reinterpretAsUInt32(substring(reverse(sampler_address),13,4))) IN ('10.0.34.2','192.168.10.1','192.168.30.1')
GROUP BY name
ORDER BY value DESC
LIMIT 10
spec.query:
SELECT
    IPv4NumToString(reinterpretAsUInt32(substring(reverse(sampler_address),13,4))) AS name,
    count() AS value
FROM $table
WHERE $timeFilter
  AND IPv4NumToString(reinterpretAsUInt32(substring(reverse(sampler_address),13,4))) IN ($sampler)
GROUP BY name
ORDER BY value DESC
LIMIT 10

spec.description: This panel is controlled by the Sampler variable
spec.title: Flow Distribution by Sampler

spec.formattedQuery:
/* grafana dashboard='Clickhouse Flows', user=admin */
SELECT
    toStartOfFiveMinute(time_received_ns) AS t,
    IPv4NumToString(reinterpretAsUInt32(substring(reverse(sampler_address),13,4))) AS sampler,
    sum(bytes * sampling_rate) AS bytes
FROM default.flows_raw
WHERE date >= toDate(1784501722) AND date <= toDate(1784523322) AND time_flow_start_ns >= toDateTime64(1784501722,3) AND time_flow_start_ns <= toDateTime64(1784523322,3)
  AND IPv4NumToString(reinterpretAsUInt32(substring(reverse(sampler_address),13,4))) IN ('10.0.34.2','192.168.10.1','192.168.30.1')
GROUP BY t, sampler
ORDER BY t ASC
spec.query:
SELECT
    toStartOfFiveMinute(time_received_ns) AS t,
    IPv4NumToString(reinterpretAsUInt32(substring(reverse(sampler_address),13,4))) AS sampler,
    sum(bytes * sampling_rate) AS bytes
FROM $table
WHERE $timeFilter
  AND IPv4NumToString(reinterpretAsUInt32(substring(reverse(sampler_address),13,4))) IN ($sampler)
GROUP BY t, sampler
ORDER BY t ASC

spec.formattedQuery:
/* grafana dashboard='Clickhouse Flows', user=admin */
SELECT
    IPv4NumToString(reinterpretAsUInt32(substring(src_addr,1,4))) AS src_ip,
    sum(bytes * sampling_rate) AS bytes,
    sum(packets) AS packets,
    count() AS flows,
    uniqExact(dst_addr) AS unique_destinations
FROM default.flows_raw
WHERE date >= toDate(1784501722) AND date <= toDate(1784523322) AND time_flow_start_ns >= toDateTime64(1784501722,3) AND time_flow_start_ns <= toDateTime64(1784523322,3)
GROUP BY src_ip
ORDER BY bytes DESC
LIMIT 20
spec.query:
SELECT
    IPv4NumToString(reinterpretAsUInt32(substring(src_addr,1,4))) AS src_ip,
    sum(bytes * sampling_rate) AS bytes,
    sum(packets) AS packets,
    count() AS flows,
    uniqExact(dst_addr) AS unique_destinations
FROM $table
WHERE $timeFilter
GROUP BY src_ip
ORDER BY bytes DESC
LIMIT 20

spec.formattedQuery:
/* grafana dashboard='Clickhouse Flows', user=admin */
SELECT
    IPv4NumToString(reinterpretAsUInt32(substring(dst_addr,1,4))) AS dst_ip,
    sum(bytes * sampling_rate) AS bytes,
    sum(packets) AS packets,
    count() AS flows,
    uniqExact(src_addr) AS unique_sources
FROM default.flows_raw
WHERE date >= toDate(1784501722) AND date <= toDate(1784523322) AND time_flow_start_ns >= toDateTime64(1784501722,3) AND time_flow_start_ns <= toDateTime64(1784523322,3)
GROUP BY dst_ip
ORDER BY bytes DESC
LIMIT 20
spec.query:
SELECT
    IPv4NumToString(reinterpretAsUInt32(substring(dst_addr,1,4))) AS dst_ip,
    sum(bytes * sampling_rate) AS bytes,
    sum(packets) AS packets,
    count() AS flows,
    uniqExact(src_addr) AS unique_sources
FROM $table
WHERE $timeFilter
GROUP BY dst_ip
ORDER BY bytes DESC
LIMIT 20

spec.formattedQuery:
/* grafana dashboard='Clickhouse Flows', user=admin */
SELECT sum(bytes * sampling_rate) / sum(packets) AS value
FROM default.flows_raw
WHERE date >= toDate(1784501722) AND date <= toDate(1784523322) AND time_flow_start_ns >= toDateTime64(1784501722,3) AND time_flow_start_ns <= toDateTime64(1784523322,3)
spec.query:
SELECT sum(bytes * sampling_rate) / sum(packets) AS value
FROM $table
WHERE $timeFilter

SELECT uniq(sampler_address) AS value FROM $table
WHERE $timeFilter

SELECT sum(bytes) / (($__to - $__from) / 1000) AS value FROM $table
WHERE $timeFilter

spec.formattedQuery:
/* grafana dashboard='Clickhouse Flows ', user=admin */
SELECT
    toStartOfFiveMinute(time_received_ns) AS t,
    multiIf(etype=2048,'IPv4',
            etype=34525,'IPv6',
            etype=2054,'ARP',
            concat('0x',hex(etype))) AS etype,
    sum(bytes * sampling_rate) AS bytes
FROM default.flows_raw
WHERE date >= toDate(1781408172) AND date <= toDate(1781429772) AND time_received_ns >= toDateTime64(1781408172,3) AND time_received_ns <= toDateTime64(1781429772,3)
GROUP BY t, etype
ORDER BY t ASC
spec.query:
SELECT
    toStartOfFiveMinute(time_received_ns) AS t,
    multiIf(etype=2048,'IPv4',
            etype=34525,'IPv6',
            etype=2054,'ARP',
            concat('0x',hex(etype))) AS etype,
    sum(bytes * sampling_rate) AS bytes
FROM $table
WHERE $timeFilter
GROUP BY t, etype
ORDER BY t ASC

spec.title: Traffic over time ? bytes by EType:

spec.formattedQuery:
/* grafana dashboard='Clickhouse Flows ', user=admin */
SELECT
    time_received_ns AS "Timestamp",
    
    IPv4NumToString(reinterpretAsUInt32(substring(src_addr, 1, 4))) AS "Source IP",
    src_port AS "Src Port",
    
    IPv4NumToString(reinterpretAsUInt32(substring(dst_addr, 1, 4))) AS "Dest IP",
    dst_port AS "Dst Port",
    dictGetString('dictionaries.protocols', 'name', toUInt8(proto)) AS "Proto",
    bytes AS "Bytes",
    packets AS "Packets"
FROM default.flows_raw
WHERE time_received_ns >= toDateTime64(1781549387, 9)
  AND time_received_ns <= toDateTime64(1781570987, 9)
  AND ('$Source_ASN' = 'All' OR '$Source_ASN' = '*' OR src_as = toUInt32OrZero('$Source_ASN'))
  AND ('$dst_as' = 'All' OR '$dst_as' = '*' OR dst_as = toUInt32OrZero('$dst_as'))
ORDER BY time_received_ns DESC
LIMIT 100
spec.query:
SELECT
    time_received_ns AS "Timestamp",
    -- Slice the first 4 bytes and interpret them as an IPv4 integer
    IPv4NumToString(reinterpretAsUInt32(substring(src_addr, 1, 4))) AS "Source IP",
    src_port AS "Src Port",
    -- Slice the first 4 bytes and interpret them as an IPv4 integer
    IPv4NumToString(reinterpretAsUInt32(substring(dst_addr, 1, 4))) AS "Dest IP",
    dst_port AS "Dst Port",
    dictGetString('dictionaries.protocols', 'name', toUInt8(proto)) AS "Proto",
    bytes AS "Bytes",
    packets AS "Packets"
FROM default.flows_raw
WHERE time_received_ns >= toDateTime64($from, 9)
  AND time_received_ns <= toDateTime64($to, 9)
  AND ('$Source_ASN' = 'All' OR '$Source_ASN' = '*' OR src_as = toUInt32OrZero('$Source_ASN'))
  AND ('$dst_as' = 'All' OR '$dst_as' = '*' OR dst_as = toUInt32OrZero('$dst_as'))
ORDER BY time_received_ns DESC
LIMIT 100

spec.formattedQuery:
/* grafana dashboard='New dashboard', user=admin */
SELECT
    dictGetString('dictionaries.protocols', 'name', toUInt8(proto)) AS protocol_name,
    sum(bytes) AS volume
FROM flows_raw
WHERE time_received_ns >= now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR
GROUP BY protocol_name
ORDER BY volume DESC
LIMIT 10
spec.query:
SELECT
    dictGetString('dictionaries.protocols', 'name', toUInt8(proto)) AS protocol_name,
    sum(bytes) AS volume
FROM flows_raw
WHERE time_received_ns >= now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR
GROUP BY protocol_name
ORDER BY volume DESC
LIMIT 10

    IPv4NumToString(reinterpretAsUInt32(substring(reverse(sampler_address),13,4)))
FROM flows_raw ORDER BY 1
